arts.ttl: Chelsea and Juventus compete for Ipswich striker Liam Delap
arts.sum: Juventus and Chelsea are reportedly monitoring Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap as both teams look to bolster their attacking options this season. The 21-year-old forward has been in impressive form since joining Ipswich permanently from Manchester City in the summer, contributing significantly to the team’s efforts in the Premier League. Delap has made a notable impact at Portman Road, scoring six goals and providing one assist in just 11 league appearances. His performances have drawn attention from several clubs, with Chelsea and Juventus both keen on securing his services.
